---
title: "Analyze Maunaloa CO2 Data"
author: "Abby Kreisler"
format: html
execute: 
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

## Analysis of CO2 at Maunaloa over time

This analysis will look at the concentration of CO2
at Maunaloa Observatory over time.

```{r}
#| label: load-packages-and-data

library("dplyr")
library ("ggplot2")

## load data
mlo_data <- read.csv("data/monthly_in_situ_co2_mlo_cleaned.csv")
```

Now that the data are loaded we will make a plot of time on the x axis
and the CO2 concentration on the y axis using ggplot.

```{r}
#| label: plot-co2

# make the plot
mlo_data %>%
  filter(CO2 > 0) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Date.1,
             y = CO2)) +
  geom_line()+
  labs(title = "CO2 concentration at MLO over time",
       x = "Year",
       y = "Carbon Dioxide Concentration")

```
the concentration of carbon dioxide goes up strongly over time
from the first measurements in the late 1950s.
